scripts.check: bun run gen:source && bun run typecheck && bun run typecheck:snippets && bun run typecheck:scenarios && bun run gen:hero && bun run gen:sitemap && bun run gen:playground-assets && bun run build && bun scripts/check-canaries.ts && bun scripts/check-pages.ts && bun scripts/check-banned-phrases.ts && bun run check:playground
scripts.typecheck:snippets: cd snippets && bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run typecheck
scripts.typecheck:scenarios: cd playground-build && bun install --frozen-lockfile && cd ../src/playground/scenarios && bunx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
